arts.ttl: Man City to make ANOTHER massive bid TONIGHT
arts.sum: The offer will arrive on Wednesday evening after the conclusion of the final matchday of the Champions League group phase, with City hosting Club Brugge at home and Juventus welcoming Benfica to Turin. Manchester City will table a massive offer for Andrea Cambiaso on Wednesday evening at the conclusion of the night’s Champions League games.
